name: mactrack-rest-api
description: This project was bootstrapped with Fastify-CLI.

scripts.test: npm run build:ts && tsc -p test/tsconfig.json && FASTIFY_AUTOLOAD_TYPESCRIPT=1 node --test --experimental-test-coverage --loader ts-node/esm test/**/*.ts
scripts.start: npm run build:ts && fastify start -l info dist/app.js
scripts.update-db-types: pnpm dlx supabase gen types typescript --project-id "mjmmgqaihrvaiijaoaoq" --schema public > src/types/database.types.ts
